company.name: Legend Biotech
company.subtitle: CARVYKTI $1.9B sales · Profitability 2026 · Frontline MM expansion · In vivo CAR-T

assets.name: CARVYKTI — 2L+ MM (approved, commercial)
assets.stage: Commercial (approved US/EU/Japan/China, OS benefit in label)
assets.partner: J&J (co-develop/commercialize; Legend manufactures + receives profit share)

market.notes: Legend's 2025 total revenue ~$1B ($1.9B CARVYKTI net trade sales booked by J&J, Legend receives mfg revenue + profit share). Q4 2025: $306M revenue (+64% YoY). 10,000+ patients treated. 97% mfg success. <30 day TAT. 10K annualized dose capacity. 279 global sites.

CARTITUDE-5 (transplant-ineligible NDMM) + CARTITUDE-6 (transplant-eligible NDMM, enrolled Aug 2025). Frontline MM is 3-5x larger patient pool than relapsed/refractory. CARTITUDE-4 showed 50.4mo median PFS — strong rationale for earlier use. Data from in vivo programs expected mid-2026.

Dual CD19/CD20 targeting. Allogeneic = off-the-shelf, no patient-specific manufacturing. First-in-human data at ASH 2025: encouraging safety + efficacy. If validated, transforms CAR-T economics (no 30-day wait).

Dual CD20/CD19 in vivo CAR-T — no cell collection, no manufacturing, just an injection. First patient dosed within 6 months of candidate selection. First-in-human data expected H2 2026. Multiple INDs planned for oncology + autoimmune H2 2026+. Paradigm shift if it works.

bear.narrative: CARVYKTI growth stalls + frontline fails + competition erodes share
events: ✗ CARVYKTI growth decelerates — bispecifics take share
✗ CARTITUDE-5/6 frontline data underwhelm vs standard of care
→ Revenue plateaus at ~$1.2B Legend share, limited upside

base.narrative: CARVYKTI continues growing + frontline expands TAM + platform validates
events: ✓ CARVYKTI revenue grows to ~$3B+ total sales (Legend ~$1.5B)
✓ CARTITUDE-5 or -6 positive — frontline label expansion
~ Allogeneic shows promise but needs more data
~ In vivo early data generates excitement

bull.narrative: CARVYKTI blockbuster + frontline standard of care + in vivo paradigm shift
events: ✓ Both CARTITUDE-5 + 6 positive — frontline MM standard
✓ In vivo CAR-T data transformative — injection replaces infusion
✓ Autoimmune CAR-T expansion (SLE, MS) — massive TAM unlock

lastData.title: CARVYKTI Q4 $555M sales + full-year profitability
points: Q4 CARVYKTI net trade sales: $555M (+66% YoY, +6% QoQ)
FY2025 CARVYKTI sales: $1.9B total (Legend total revenue ~$1B)
Q4 Legend revenue: $306M (+64% YoY), gross margin 61%
Adjusted net income: $2.5M (vs -$59M loss year ago) — breakeven
10,000+ patients treated, 97% mfg success, <30 day TAT
CARTITUDE-5 and CARTITUDE-6 both fully enrolled
In vivo CAR-T: first patient dosed, data expected H2 2026
LUCAR-G39D (allogeneic): encouraging Phase 1 data at ASH 2025
Stock at $17 vs $45 twelve months ago — deeply discounted

nextCatalyst.title: In vivo CAR-T first-in-human data at major medical meeting
thresholds: Safety + initial efficacy of in vivo CD20/CD19 CAR-T
If positive: paradigm shift (injection vs 30-day manufacturing)
Also: CARTITUDE-5/6 frontline data readouts (timing TBD)
Also: multiple IND filings for oncology + autoimmune planned

risks: J&J collaboration economics — Legend gets ~50% of value, not 100%
Arcellx anito-cel (BCMA CAR-T competitor) gaining traction
Bispecific antibodies (teclistamab, elranatamab) eroding CAR-T share in later lines
Manufacturing complexity — 10K capacity may not be enough for frontline
Stock down 60% from highs despite strong fundamentals — what does market know?
In vivo CAR-T is very early — high scientific risk
Frontline MM competition intense (daratumumab combos, bispecifics)
